utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look , these clowns are trying to take us for a ride and I am not gonna let em ! And we are not a couple of suckers !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: But look , all these rooms are fine okay ? Can you just pick one so I can watch ... have a perfect , magical weekend together with you .
